headline: FTAV’s further reading
body_text:
Pub quiz pub quiz pub quiz (in New York this time)!

Elsewhere on Tuesday . . .

— Big win for Europe in the global chips war (Reuters)

— Professional economists who were heads of government or state, cabinet ministers, or elected members of legislatures (Bartlett’s Notations)

— Strategy or spectacle in South America? (War on the Rocks)

— What qualifies as middle-income in each US state (Flowing Data)

— I tried OpenAI’s new Atlas browser but I still don’t know what it’s for (MIT Technology Review)

— Anglofascism (Lateral Thinking)

— A Pilgrim Route in Norway: Berries, Bogs and a Viking King (NYT)
